product_overview: A creator-focused dashboard for building, editing, and managing immersive portrait-format stories. Authors can create and manage story drafts, compose chapters with rich text and illustrations, upload media to the asset library, and update their public operative dossier.
core_goals: Create, edit and organize story drafts and their metadata so authors can prepare immersive stories for publication
Compose chapter content (rich text) and attach portrait illustrations to build the story narrative
Upload and manage image and audio assets for reuse across stories and chapters
Manage personal profile (alias, bio, avatar) and sync identity so creators present a consistent public dossier

features.name: Story Management
features.description: List, create, update and remove story drafts and their metadata so creators can manage story lifecycle from draft to published.
user_flows: Navigate to /stories -> View list of stories -> Create a new story -> Edit story metadata -> Save metadata -> See new story appear in the list
Navigate to /stories -> View list of stories -> Open story details from the list -> Edit story metadata -> Save changes -> See updated metadata in story list
Navigate to /stories -> Create a new story -> Submit without required title -> See inline validation error

features.name: Chapter Builder
features.description: Add, edit and reorder chapters within a story draft, compose chapter content with the rich text editor, and attach portrait illustrations.
user_flows: Navigate to /stories -> View list of stories -> Open draft editor for a story -> Add new chapter -> Edit chapter content -> Upload chapter illustration -> Save chapter -> See chapter listed in draft outline
Navigate to /stories -> Open draft editor for a story -> Add new chapter -> Delete chapter -> See chapter removed from draft outline
Navigate to /stories -> Open draft editor for a story -> Upload chapter illustration with unsupported file type -> See file validation error

features.name: Asset Library
features.description: Upload and organize image and audio assets (Cloudinary-backed) and browse recent assets in a grid for reuse in stories and chapters.
user_flows: Navigate to /library -> Select asset type (image or audio) -> Upload file -> See uploaded asset appear in the asset grid
Navigate to /library -> Select asset type -> Upload file -> Assign tags or metadata -> See metadata displayed in asset grid
Navigate to /library -> Select asset type -> Upload unsupported or oversized file -> See inline validation error

features.name: Settings (Operative Dossier)
features.description: Edit creator profile information — alias, bio and avatar — and trigger identity sync so the public dossier remains up to date.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Edit alias -> Edit bio -> Upload new avatar -> Save changes -> See updated alias, bio and avatar in the dossier preview
Navigate to /settings -> Upload new avatar -> Cancel before saving -> See previous avatar remain unchanged
Navigate to /settings -> Edit alias with invalid value (too short) -> Attempt to save -> See inline validation error

routes.description: Dashboard landing page showing overview and quick actions
Stories list page for managing created stories
Chapter builder and editor for a specific story draft
Asset library for managing images and audio
Admin panel for managing users and platform settings

features.name: Story Management
features.description: Create, edit, and manage story drafts and metadata

features.name: Chapter Builder
features.description: Edit story chapters with Tiptap rich text editor

features.name: Asset Library
features.description: Upload and manage images and audio files via Cloudinary

features.name: Settings
features.description: Update user profile, alias, bio, and avatar
